title: ornithopus × compressus
intro: Ornithopus × compressus, also known as the Ornithopus hybrid or Compressed Bird's Foot Trefoil, is a perennial legume that is a natural hybrid between two species of the Ornithopus genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Ornithopus × compressus include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant effects, making it a valuable addition to a holistic approach to health. Ornithopus × compressus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
